title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・泥道こそ花道

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black stuns the audience into silence as
she brute forces her way through the quagmire of
a racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And explodes past the finish line. Her resilience
ensnares the hearts of many, and Satono
Diamond, who sees her dear friend win, is
inspired.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is a festival on an international
scale—the Japan Cup. Kitasan Black swears to
make it a good one with the other powerful
athletes at Tokyo Racecourse.
